title: MessagePayload
description: The message object containing all parameters for a transactional email, including recipients, content, attachments, and tracking options.

html.description: The full HTML content of the message.

text.description: The full plain-text content of the message.

type.description: The recipient type (to, cc, or bcc).

headers.description: Optional extra headers to add to the message (e.g., Reply-To).

important.description: Whether this message is important and should be delivered ahead of non-important messages.

track_opens.description: Whether to enable open tracking for this message.

track_clicks.description: Whether to enable click tracking for this message.

auto_text.description: Whether to automatically generate a plain-text version from the HTML content.

auto_html.description: Whether to automatically generate HTML from the plain-text content.

inline_css.description: Whether to automatically inline all CSS styles from style blocks in the HTML content.

url_strip_qs.description: Whether to strip query strings from URLs when aggregating tracked click data.

preserve_recipients.description: Whether to show all recipients in the To header of each email.

view_content_link.description: Whether to include a View Content Link in the Mandrill dashboard for this message.

bcc_address.description: An optional address to BCC on the message.

tracking_domain.description: A custom domain to use for tracking opens and clicks.

signing_domain.description: A custom domain to use for DKIM signing instead of the default.

return_path_domain.description: A custom domain to use for the return-path header.

merge.description: Whether to evaluate merge tags in the message.

merge_language.description: The merge tag language to use (Mailchimp or Handlebars).

global_merge_vars.description: Global merge variables applied to all recipients.

tags.description: An array of string tags to apply to this message for analytics.

subaccount.description: The unique ID of a subaccount for this message.

google_analytics_domains.description: An array of domains for which Google Analytics tracking parameters will be appended.

google_analytics_campaign.description: The utm_campaign tracking parameter for Google Analytics.

metadata.description: Key-value metadata to associate with the message.

type.description: The MIME type of the attachment.

name.description: The file name of the attachment.

images.description: An array of inline images referenced with "cid:" in the HTML content.

type.description: The MIME type of the image (e.g., image/png).

name.description: The Content-ID of the image, referenced as "cid:name" in HTML.
